title: Braised Ukrainian BBQ Meatballs
description: Delicious Ukrainian-style BBQ meatballs with a twist of smoky charred flavor.
instructions: 2. In a large mixing bowl, combine ground pork, charred onions, crunchy breadcrumbs, barbeque sauce, and Ukrainian seasoning.
3. Mix well with your hands until everything is fully incorporated.
4. Use your hands to shape the mixture into meatballs, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
5. Place the meatballs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake for 18-20 minutes or until cooked through.
7. While the meatballs are baking, heat the braised meat broth in a saucepan over medium heat.
8. Once the meatballs are done, carefully place them in the saucepan with the braised meat broth.
9. Reduce heat to low and let simmer for 5-7 minutes, allowing the meatballs to absorb the flavors.
